'''鈭歞h-th-t''' ('''dhathata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeguile|unbeguile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeguile|unbeguile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-th-t
|-
! Lemma
| dhathata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhathatithi|dhathatithi]] || [[word:dhathatiji|dhathatiji]] || [[word:dhathatishi|dhathatishi]] || [[word:dhathati|dhathati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathatuthuth|dhathatuthuth]] || [[word:dhathatujuj|dhathatujuj]] || [[word:dhathatushush|dhathatushush]] || [[word:dhathat|dhathat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathatuthu|dhathatuthu]] || [[word:dhathatuju|dhathatuju]] || [[word:dhathatushu|dhathatushu]] || [[word:dhathatu|dhathatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathatufuth|dhathatufuth]] || [[word:dhathatufuj|dhathatufuj]] || [[word:dhathatufush|dhathatufush]] || [[word:dhathatuf|dhathatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhathatethe|dhathatethe]] || [[word:dhathateje|dhathateje]] || [[word:dhathateshe|dhathateshe]] || [[word:dhathate|dhathate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathatothoth|dhathatothoth]] || [[word:dhathatojoj|dhathatojoj]] || [[word:dhathatoshosh|dhathatoshosh]] || [[word:dhathat|dhathat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathatotho|dhathatotho]] || [[word:dhathatojo|dhathatojo]] || [[word:dhathatosho|dhathatosho]] || [[word:dhathato|dhathato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathatofoth|dhathatofoth]] || [[word:dhathatofoj|dhathatofoj]] || [[word:dhathatofosh|dhathatofosh]] || [[word:dhathatof|dhathatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhathat忙th忙|dhathat忙th忙]] || [[word:dhathat忙j忙|dhathat忙j忙]] || [[word:dhathat忙sh忙|dhathat忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhathat忙|dhathat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathatathath|dhathatathath]] || [[word:dhathatajaj|dhathatajaj]] || [[word:dhathatashash|dhathatashash]] || [[word:dhathat|dhathat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathatatha|dhathatatha]] || [[word:dhathataja|dhathataja]] || [[word:dhathatasha|dhathatasha]] || [[word:dhathata|dhathata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathatafath|dhathatafath]] || [[word:dhathatafaj|dhathatafaj]] || [[word:dhathatafash|dhathatafash]] || [[word:dhathataf|dhathataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhathatasha|dhathatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhathatasha|godhathatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhathatasha|gokidhathatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhathatn眉sha|dhathatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhathatnkn眉sha|godhathatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhathatn眉sha|gokidhathatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhathatsh毛sha|dhathatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhathatnksh毛sha|godhathatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhathatsh毛sha|gokidhathatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhathatrosha|dhathatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhathatnkrosha|godhathatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhathatrosha|gokidhathatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhathatmusha|dhathatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhathatnkmusha|godhathatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhathatmusha|gokidhathatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhathatsherasha|dhathatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhathatnksherasha|godhathatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhathatsherasha|gokidhathatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhathatngasha|dhathatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhathatnkngasha|godhathatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhathatngasha|gokidhathatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhathatyasha|dhathatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhathatnkyasha|godhathatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhathatyasha|gokidhathatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhathatyamasha|dhathatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhathatnkyamasha|godhathatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhathatyamasha|gokidhathatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhathatn眉sh毛sha|dhathatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhathatnkn眉sh毛sha|godhathatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhathatn眉sh毛sha|gokidhathatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhathatn眉rosha|dhathatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhathatnkn眉rosha|godhathatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhathatn眉rosha|gokidhathatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhathatn眉musha|dhathatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhathatnkn眉musha|godhathatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhathatn眉musha|gokidhathatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhathatsh毛n眉sha|dhathatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhathatnksh毛n眉sha|godhathatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhathatsh毛n眉sha|gokidhathatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhathatsh毛rosha|dhathatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhathatnksh毛rosha|godhathatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhathatsh毛rosha|gokidhathatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhathatsh毛musha|dhathatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhathatnksh毛musha|godhathatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhathatsh毛musha|gokidhathatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhathatron眉sha|dhathatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhathatnkron眉sha|godhathatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhathatron眉sha|gokidhathatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhathatrosh毛sha|dhathatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhathatnkrosh毛sha|godhathatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhathatrosh毛sha|gokidhathatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhathatromusha|dhathatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhathatnkromusha|godhathatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhathatromusha|gokidhathatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhathatmun眉sha|dhathatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhathatnkmun眉sha|godhathatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhathatmun眉sha|gokidhathatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhathatmush毛sha|dhathatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhathatnkmush毛sha|godhathatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhathatmush毛sha|gokidhathatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhathatmurosha|dhathatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhathatnkmurosha|godhathatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhathatmurosha|gokidhathatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhathat|dhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙th忙t|dh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhathat|hodhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙th忙t|hodh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhathat|hohodhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙th忙t|hohodh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhathat|n眉dhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙th忙t|n眉dh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhathat|n眉n眉dhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙th忙t|n眉n眉dh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhathat|n茂dhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙th忙t|n茂dh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhathat|n茂n茂dhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙th忙t|n茂n茂dh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhathat|ludhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙th忙t|ludh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhathat|luludhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙th忙t|luludh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhathat|lidhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙th忙t|lidh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhathat|lilidhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙th忙t|lilidh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhathat|kodhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙th忙t|kodh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhathat|kokodhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙th忙t|kokodh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhathat|kedhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙th忙t|kedh忙th忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhathat|kekedhathat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙th忙t|kekedh忙th忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
